goal: compose[Pair[T, U], Pair[V, W], V](pair_first[V, W], pair_map[T, U, V, W](f, g), p) = pair_first[V, W](pair_map[T, U, V, W](f, g, p))

p.c: function[T0, T1, T2](x0: T1 -> T2, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x1(x2)) }[Pair[T, U], Pair[V, W], V](pair_first[V, W], pair_map[T, U, V, W](f, g), p)

goal: pair_first[V, W](pair_map[T, U, V, W](f, g, p)) = pair_map[T, U, V, W](f, g, p).first
pair_map[T, U, V, W](f, g, p).first = f(p.first)
compose[Pair[T, U], T, V](f, pair_first[T, U], p) = f(pair_first[T, U](p))

p.c: function[T0, T1, T2](x0: T1 -> T2, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x1(x2)) }[Pair[T, U], T, V](f, pair_first[T, U], p)

goal: compose[Pair[T, U], T, V](f, pair_first[T, U], p) = f(p.first)
compose[Pair[T, U], Pair[V, W], V](pair_first[V, W], pair_map[T, U, V, W](f, g), p) = compose[Pair[T, U], T, V](f, pair_first[T, U], p)
compose[Pair[T, U], Pair[V, W], W](pair_second[V, W], pair_map[T, U, V, W](f, g), p) = pair_second[V, W](pair_map[T, U, V, W](f, g, p))

p.c: function[T0, T1, T2](x0: T1 -> T2, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x1(x2)) }[Pair[T, U], Pair[V, W], W](pair_second[V, W], pair_map[T, U, V, W](f, g), p)

goal: pair_second[V, W](pair_map[T, U, V, W](f, g, p)) = pair_map[T, U, V, W](f, g, p).second
pair_map[T, U, V, W](f, g, p).second = g(p.second)
compose[Pair[T, U], U, W](g, pair_second[T, U], p) = g(pair_second[T, U](p))

p.c: function[T0, T1, T2](x0: T1 -> T2, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x1(x2)) }[Pair[T, U], U, W](g, pair_second[T, U], p)

goal: compose[Pair[T, U], U, W](g, pair_second[T, U], p) = g(p.second)
compose[Pair[T, U], Pair[V, W], W](pair_second[V, W], pair_map[T, U, V, W](f, g), p) = compose[Pair[T, U], U, W](g, pair_second[T, U], p)
compose[Z, Pair[X, Y], X](pair_first[X, Y], fan_out[Z, X, Y](f, g), z) = pair_first[X, Y](fan_out[Z, X, Y](f, g, z))

p.c: function[T0, T1, T2](x0: T1 -> T2, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x1(x2)) }[Z, Pair[X, Y], X](pair_first[X, Y], fan_out[Z, X, Y](f, g), z)

goal: pair_first[X, Y](fan_out[Z, X, Y](f, g, z)) = fan_out[Z, X, Y](f, g, z).first
fan_out[Z, X, Y](f, g, z).first = f(z)
compose[Z, Pair[X, Y], X](pair_first[X, Y], fan_out[Z, X, Y](f, g), z) = f(z)
compose[Z, Pair[X, Y], Y](pair_second[X, Y], fan_out[Z, X, Y](f, g), z) = pair_second[X, Y](fan_out[Z, X, Y](f, g, z))

p.c: function[T0, T1, T2](x0: T1 -> T2, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x1(x2)) }[Z, Pair[X, Y], Y](pair_second[X, Y], fan_out[Z, X, Y](f, g), z)

goal: pair_second[X, Y](fan_out[Z, X, Y](f, g, z)) = fan_out[Z, X, Y](f, g, z).second
fan_out[Z, X, Y](f, g, z).second = g(z)
compose[Z, Pair[X, Y], Y](pair_second[X, Y], fan_out[Z, X, Y](f, g), z) = g(z)
rhs.first = compose[Pair[T, U], T, V](f, pair_first[T, U], p)
compose[Pair[T, U], T, V](f, pair_first[T, U], p) = f(pair_first[T, U](p))

p.c: function[T0, T1, T2](x0: T1 -> T2, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x1(x2)) }[Pair[T, U], T, V](f, pair_first[T, U], p)

goal: rhs.second = compose[Pair[T, U], U, W](g, pair_second[T, U], p)
compose[Pair[T, U], U, W](g, pair_second[T, U], p) = g(pair_second[T, U](p))

p.c: function[T0, T1, T2](x0: T1 -> T2, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x1(x2)) }[Pair[T, U], U, W](g, pair_second[T, U], p)
